- RIGHT: moves S squares toward center by 5 cols (19->24, 39->34)
- LEFT: moves S squares away from center by 5 cols (24->19, 34->39) or (19->14, 39->44)
- UP: moves S squares up by 5 rows (49->44)
- DOWN: moves S squares down by 5 rows (44->49)
Each direction can only be used once per cycle. After using RIGHT, pressing RIGHT again doesn't move the squares. After using UP, pressing UP again doesn't move the squares.
